message:
wire HookRunner into session lifecycle

Add plugin integration to Session: initPlugins() loads plugins, merges
skills/agents/hooks, and fires SessionStart hooks during initialization.
Hook dispatch points wired at all lifecycle events: PreToolUse (with deny
support), PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, PreCompact, Stop (with block
support), SessionStart, and SessionEnd. clientAdapter bridges llm.Client
to PromptHookClient interface for prompt hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
